search.title: Random Access Memories
search.snippet: Random Access Memories is the fourth and final studio album by the French electronic music duo Daft Punk, released on 17 May 2013 through Columbia Records

search.title: Daft Punk
search.snippet: and included Discovery and Random Access Memories on their 2020 list of the 500 Greatest Albums of All Time.

search.title: List of songs recorded by Daft Punk
search.snippet: on the Japanese edition of Random Access Memories.

search.title: Giorgio by Moroder
search.snippet: electronic music duo Daft Punk for their fourth studio album, Random Access Memories (2013).

search.title: Doin' It Right
search.snippet: Daft Punk featuring the American musician Panda Bear of the band Animal Collective. It is a track on Daft Punk's fourth album Random Access Memories (2013)
